channel.title: How to Automatically Break Up Long WordPress Posts Into Multiple Pages
channel.description: I am working on a frontity website and i want to add a post pagination feature to my website but don't have any idea how to achieve.

item.title: How to Automatically Break Up Long WordPress Posts Into Multiple Pages
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @techymanjil96

Take a look at this thread which may point you in the right direction.

Let me know if this provides you with what you need.

Read full topic
item.source: How to Automatically Break Up Long WordPress Posts Into Multiple Pages

item.title: How to Automatically Break Up Long WordPress Posts Into Multiple Pages
